name: Centuria Capital Group
analysis: CNI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.0200. Trade idea: entry A$2.1750, stop A$1.8365, target A$3.1906 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
